meta.description: Daily Reflection Tree — DT Fellowship Assignment

START.text:
Good evening.

This is a 5-minute reflection on your day.
No right answers. Just an honest look at how you showed up.

Let's begin.

A1_OPEN.text:
AXIS 1 — AGENCY

If today were a weather report, it would be...

options.label: Sunny — things mostly went my way
Stormy — a lot hit me today
Foggy — I felt stuck or confused

values: Sunny — things mostly went my way
Stormy — a lot hit me today
Foggy — I felt stuck or confused

A1_Q_HIGH.text:
You said it felt like "{A1_OPEN}".

When something went well today, what made it happen?

options.label: I had prepared well for it
Luck or timing was on my side

A1_Q_LOW.text:
You said it felt like "{A1_OPEN}".

When things got difficult, what was your first instinct?

options.label: Focus on what I could control

A1_R_INT.text: You see your agency. Even on a rough road, you stayed in the driver's seat. That is the core of a growth mindset.

A1_R_EXT.text: A heavy day pulls attention outward to circumstances. Remember: you always have a choice in how you respond.

BRIDGE_1_2.text: Now let's shift from how you handled things to what you gave today.

A2_OPEN.text:
AXIS 2 — CONTRIBUTION

Which of these moments from today feels most like yours?

options.label: I helped someone with an unassigned task
I shared knowledge with a colleague
I felt my work wasn't recognized enough
I did exactly what was required

A2_R_CONTRIB.text: You practiced 'Organizational Citizenship.' Giving beyond the script is what builds real culture.

A2_R_ENTITLE.text: Notice the gap between your expectations and reality. That gap is where growth happens.

BRIDGE_2_3.text: Finally, let's zoom out to the people around you.

A3_OPEN.text:
AXIS 3 — RADIUS

When you think about today's biggest challenge, who was in the frame?

A3_R_ALTRO.text: Self-transcendence is the shift from 'Me' to 'Us.' It’s the most reliable source of meaning.

A3_R_SELF.text: Focusing inward is natural on hard days, but widening the frame often provides relief.
